mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card behavior on Print and Payment History page when a plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages, additional pages, progress bars, tooltips, and page count displays.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: No printer enrollment methods found in this batch. Batch contains core utilities (utils.py, validator.py), cancellation helper, and dashboard helper, but no enrollment functionality. Enrollment methods likely exist in enrollment_helper.py or similar modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription state verification methods found in this batch. No API helpers for retrieving subscription details or verifying free months status. These methods likely exist in API helper modules or subscription management helpers in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods found in this batch. No API calls or verification methods for checking subscription status. These components likely exist in subscription management or API helper modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.

components_found_in_this_batch.what_it_does: Pauses a subscription plan for a specified number of months from either Dashboard or Cancellation page. Creates OverviewPage and CancellationPage instances. If page_view is 'Dashboard', clicks overview_page.pause_plan_link. If page_view is 'Cancellation', clicks cancellation_page.pause_plan_link. Waits for pause_plan_modal to appear using .last locator. Clicks pause_plan_dropdown using .last locator to open it. Constructs selector for dropdown option with data-value matching months parameter. Clicks the months option. Clicks confirm_pause_plan button using .last locator. Waits for pause_plan_modal to be hidden. This completes the plan pause flow with month selection.
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: This method directly fulfills precondition 4 by pausing the subscription plan. It handles clicking the pause plan link, selecting the pause duration from a dropdown, and confirming the pause. This is exactly what the precondition requires - triggering the plan pause before the main test steps begin.

matched_methods.what_it_does: Pauses a subscription plan for a specified number of months from either Dashboard or Cancellation page. Creates OverviewPage and CancellationPage instances. If page_view is 'Dashboard', clicks overview_page.pause_plan_link. If page_view is 'Cancellation', clicks cancellation_page.pause_plan_link. Waits for pause_plan_modal to appear using .last locator. Clicks pause_plan_dropdown using .last locator to open it. Constructs selector for dropdown option with data-value matching months parameter. Clicks the months option. Clicks confirm_pause_plan button using .last locator. Waits for pause_plan_modal to be hidden. This completes the plan pause flow with month selection.
matched_methods.relevance_reason: This method is used to fulfill precondition 4 which requires pausing the plan before the test begins. It provides the complete pause plan functionality including modal interaction and month selection.

matched_helpers.what_it_does: Static helper class providing comprehensive utility methods for dashboard and account management testing. Contains methods for dashboard access and navigation, plan verification and management, billing and payment operations supporting multiple payment gateways (PGS, 2CO) and methods (credit card, PayPal, direct debit, Google Pay, Apple Pay), address management, printer selection, savings calculator validation, session handling, and various dashboard feature testing. All methods are static and operate on page objects passed as parameters.
matched_helpers.relevance_reason: This helper class contains the pause_plan method needed for precondition 4. It provides dashboard-related operations including plan management which is required for test setup.

test_case_mappings.batch_analysis_summary: This batch contains core utility modules (utils.py with 44KB of utilities for Excel, screenshots, animations, flow execution; validator.py with 33KB for image comparison and validation), documentation (help.html), and two helper modules (cancellation_plan_helper.py with 38 methods for cancellation flows; dashboard_helper.py with 70 methods for dashboard operations). The test case C44873414 is about validating the Billing Cycle Period card on the Print and Payment History page with progress bars, tooltips, and page count tracking during a paused plan scenario. Only ONE component from this batch is relevant: DashboardHelper.pause_plan() which fulfills precondition 4 (pausing the plan). All other test requirements including page navigation, element verification, progress bar validation, tooltip interaction, page count verification, API calls for time shifting and page printing, and all test data are NOT found in this batch. The test case requires a page object for Print and Payment History page with locators for billing cycle card, progress bars, tooltips, info icons, and page count displays, plus API helpers for time manipulation and page printing simulation, plus verification methods for CSS properties (colors), text content, and element visibility - none of which exist in this batch. These components likely exist in other batches containing the Print and Payment History page object, API utilities, and page-specific helper methods.
